details: The "Maternity Benefit" scheme by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board .under this scheme, registered female beneficiaries (women who are officially enrolled in the scheme) will receive ₹25,000/- annually as financial support when they give birth or during the delivery of a child. The purpose of the scheme is to provide maternity financial assistance to construction workers in Himachal Pradesh.
benefits: ₹25,000/- to registered female worker at the time of delivery or upon the birth of a child.
eligibility: For Registration as a Building/ Construction Worker:
The applicant should be a resident of Himachal Pradesh
The applicant should be a Building/ Construction Worker..
The applicant should be aged between 18 and 60 years.
The worker should have completed at least 90 days of building and other construction work in the last 12 months.
The registration of the applicant should be renewed annually.
For the Application of the Welfare Scheme:
The beneficiary should be a woman.
The woman should be registered as a worker with the "Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board".
The worker's membership with the Welfare Board must be active at the time of application.
The worker should have at least two months of subscription with the Board.

online: The Registration Process for Building and Other Construction Workers is as follows:
The interested applicant should visit the Labor Welfare Office (during office hours) and request a hard copy of the prescribed

In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, paste a passport-sized photograph (signed across, if required), and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).

Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with a wage slip or appointment letter from the employer, verifying 90 days of construction work. If unavailable, a certificate from a local authority (such as a councilor, executive officer, or Panchayat Secretary) can be submitted to verify employment.
After submitting the documents and payment, the worker will receive an acknowledgment receipt confirming their registration.
Ensure that the application is submitted within the prescribed period, if any.
After three years, the worker must visit the office to pay a renewal fee and submit proof of 90 days of work each year to maintain eligibility for benefits.
A one-time registration fee must be paid at the office, and it will be valid for three years.

documents_required: Documents Required for Registration as a Building/Construction Worker:
Proof of Residence (e.g., Utility bill, Voter ID, etc.)
Bank Account Details (e.g., Copy of Bank Passbook)
Certificate issued by District Medical Board (if both of the above are unavailable)
Documents Required for Application of a Welfare Scheme:

faqs.question: What is the Maternity Benefit scheme by HPBOCWWB?
faqs.answer: The Maternity Benefit scheme provides ₹25,000 annually as financial assistance to registered female construction workers in Himachal Pradesh during childbirth or pregnancy.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the Maternity Benefit?
faqs.answer: Only female construction workers registered with the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board are eligible.

faqs.question: How much financial support will a woman receive under this scheme?
faqs.answer: A woman will receive ₹25,000 as financial assistance during childbirth or pregnancy under the Maternity Benefit scheme.

faqs.question: What is the age requirement for the applicant?
faqs.answer: The applicant must be between the ages of 18 and 60 years.

faqs.question: How long should a worker have worked to apply for the Maternity Benefit?
faqs.answer: The worker should have completed at least 90 days of building or construction work in the last 12 months.

faqs.question: Do I need to be a resident of Himachal Pradesh to apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must be a resident of Himachal Pradesh.

faqs.question: How can I register as a construction worker?
faqs.answer: To register, the applicant must meet the criteria of being a building/construction worker in Himachal Pradesh and apply through the HPBOCWWB.

faqs.question: Can the registration be renewed?
faqs.answer: Yes, the worker’s registration is required to be renewed annually to remain eligible for the benefits.

faqs.question: Can I apply for the Maternity Benefit if I’m not pregnant yet?
faqs.answer: No, the beneficiary must be pregnant to apply for the Maternity Benefit scheme.

faqs.question: How many months of subscription are required to apply?
faqs.answer: The female worker must have at least two months of active membership with the HPBOCWWB.

faqs.question: Do I need to have an active membership with the HPBOCWWB to apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, the worker’s membership with the Welfare Board must be active at the time of application.
